ai_summary: Here's a 3-sentence executive summary:  Ajanta Pharma Limited held its 47th Annual General Meeting (AGM) on July 16, 2026, discussing standard business items including the adoption of FY2025-2026 financial statements and the re-appointment of its Chairman. A material positive impact is the confirmation that both Statutory and Secretarial Audit Reports for FY2025-2026 contained no qualifications or adverse remarks, indicating sound financial health and compliance. The final voting results for the resolutions are pending and will be disclosed within two working days, with no immediate red flags identified in the proceedings.
